channel.title: Product Work on Devika Jallegowda
channel.description: Recent content in Product Work on Devika Jallegowda

item.title: Feature Prioritization Framework
item.description:
As part of a 3-month MVP sprint, I supported the founding team by:

  • Defining user stories and epics
  • Prioritizing backlog using a value-impact matrix
  • Leading async sprint planning with dev + design teams

Tools: Notion, Figma, Slack, Google Docs
